_comment: Exercise app B (#318). Standards it COMMITS to conforming to (Layer 1) — at S0 these are the standards the loan app drove, now consumed by a second app (a cross-app conformance check) — plus candidate standards it will drive in later slices (Layer 2). See docs/agent/exercise-app-workflow.md.

standards.concept: selecting a policy (via the master-detail coordinator)
the underwriting decision as a DecisionRecord
per-policy immutable history; transitions auto-log + timeline
the multi-step quote wizard (locked progression + per-step gate)
the coverage hierarchy builder (role=tree, cascade selection)
event-driven notifications to the relevant actor (policy bound/referred, claim status) — S10 (#421)

candidateStandards.concept: permissions / authorization (Web Guards CustomGuardProvider — server-authoritative; the UW workbench uses the in-app lifecycle GuardResolver as a stand-in)
configurator / NL-to-config constraint graph (conditional questionnaire branching + coverage eligibility constraints)
file-upload block (dropzone / preview / multi-file / progress UX — the FNOL uses a native <input type=file> as the native-first baseline; the richer component is uncodified)
